description:
calibre is the one stop solution to all your e-book needs.

calibre is an e-book manager. It can view, convert, edit and catalog e-books in all of the major e-book formats. It can also talk to e-book reader devices. It can go out to the internet and fetch metadata for your books. It can download newspapers and convert them into e-books for convenient reading. It is cross platform, running on Linux, Windows and macOS.
New features
- Kindle driver: Add support for generating page number files (APNX) on 2024 and newer MTP based Kindles
- When finding similar books by author ignore "et al." suffix on author names
  Closes tickets: 2116804
Bug fixes
- Fix a regression in the previous release that broke configuring Sending of books to device
  Closes tickets: 2116864
- Kobo driver: Fix a regression that caused ancient, pre-Touch kobo devices to no longer work with calibre
  Closes tickets: 2117113
- MTP driver: Workaround for LibMTP no longer returning device serial numbers on some systems
- Edit book: Fix the next/previous buttons in the Text search tool not working
- Fix series and publisher mapping rules not handling commas correctly when downloading metadata one book at a time
  Closes tickets: 2116065
- Edit metadata dialog: When there are only a few cusotm comments like fields stretch them vertically to take up unused psace
Improved news sources
- New York Magazine
- World Archaeology
- Minerva Magazine
- Military History
- Ancient Egypt
